message:
feat: WasmAggregateOperator OR support + parser reserved word fix

- WasmAggregateOperator now handles filterGroups (OR filter groups):
  evaluates each group via evalAndFilters(), unions results via WASM
  unionIndices, intersects with AND filter results
- Extracted evalAndFilters() method from inline filter loop for reuse
- canUseWasmAggregate validates both AND filters and OR group filters
- Fixed not_between incorrectly using range filter (rejected from WASM
  aggregate path since no inverted range export exists)
- Parser: allow DATA and VERSION as identifiers (fixes GROUP BY test
  with "data" as table name)
